subject: [PATCH v2 082/110] ext2: replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings

reviews.author: Jeff Linux-f2fs-devel
reviews.summary: The reviewer noted that the patch does not address all instances of PRIino in ext2 code, specifically mentioning ext2_xattr.c where PRIino is still used.

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the patch does not include Reviewed-by tag, and added their own Reviewed-by tag.
reviews.raw_body:
Looks good. Feel free to add:

Reviewed-by: Jan Kara <jack@suse.cz>

								Honza

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch updates the ext2 file system to use explicit format strings instead of the deprecated PRIino macro, which is no longer needed since inode numbers are now u64 type. The changes affect several files in the ext2 directory and correct formatting issues in error messages.
